away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

injuries.name: Isabelle Harrison
injuries.comment: Harrison is still waiting to make her season debut while recovering from a right hand injury. Her next chance to do so arrives Sunday at home against the Sky, but it's unclear if Harrison is close to playing.

injuries.name: Temi Fagbenle
injuries.comment: Fagbenle remains sidelined due to a right shoulder injury. Her next chance to return comes Sunday, when the Tempo host the sky.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

injuries.name: Sabrina Ionescu
injuries.comment: Ionescu was unable to shake her questionable tag for this contest and will be held out for a fourth straight game. Her next chance to return comes Saturday against the Fever. In the meantime, Pauline Astier and Marine Johannes will likely see additional run.

injuries.name: Marine Fauthoux
injuries.comment: Fauthoux is practicing in full amid the final stages of her ACL surgery recovery. Although the guard isn't yet cleared for game action, Fauthoux can be deemed day-to-day ahead of Saturday's tilt against the Fever.
